title: She's won 24 Paralympic medals. But Oksana Masters wants to talk about times she lost
text: {"source": "npr_news", "title": "She's won 24 Paralympic medals. But Oksana Masters wants to talk about times she lost", "text": "Oksana Masters leaves Italy with five new para Nordic skiing medals, extending her reign as the most decorated U.S. Winter Paralympian.
